---
title: Costs and Getting Access
---

## How to get access?

The VU SciSure key users can invite new users to the project group. Users can login through SSO using their VU credentials: [eLabNext](https://vu.elabnext.com).

## Are there costs involved? 

Costs are based on active licence seats and are on a yearly basis for the faculties ACTA, FGB and BETA. 
How expenses are charged is organised at faculty level. For more information about costs please contact your VU SciSure organisational admin.
